title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Cholamandalam Finance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Cholamandalam Finance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cholamandalam Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cholamandalam Finance:
Cholamandalam Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cholamandalam Finance!
